info.title: RESTai
info.description:
RESTai is an AIaaS (AI as a Service) platform. Create AI projects and consume them via REST API.

Supports multiple project types: **RAG**, **Agent**, and **Block**.

## Authentication

All endpoints require authentication via one of:
- **JWT Cookie** (`restai_token`)
- **Bearer API Key** (`Authorization: Bearer <key>`)
- **Basic Auth** (`Authorization: Basic <credentials>`)

get.description: Initiate OAuth login flow for the specified provider.
Handle OAuth callback from the specified provider.
Get LLM configuration by ID.

delete.description: Delete an LLM provider (admin only).

get.description: List registered LLMs. Non-admin users only see LLMs accessible via their teams.

schema.title: Response Api Get Llms Llms Get

post.description: Register a new LLM provider (admin only).

get.description: Get embedding model configuration by ID.

delete.description: Delete an embedding model provider (admin only).

get.description: List registered embedding models. Non-admin users only see embeddings accessible via their teams.

schema.title: Response Api Get Embeddings Embeddings Get

post.description: Register a new embedding model provider (admin only).

get.description: List projects accessible to the current user.

parameters.name: filter

schema.description: Filter mode: 'public' to list only public projects, empty for all accessible projects
schema.title: Filter

parameters.description: Filter mode: 'public' to list only public projects, empty for all accessible projects

post.description: Create a new AI project.

get.description: Get health scores for all accessible projects.
Get detailed information about a specific project.

delete.description: Delete a project and all associated data.

post.description: Reset all embeddings for a RAG project.
Search embeddings by text similarity or source.

get.description: Get embedding chunks for a specific source.
Get a specific embedding chunk by ID.

post.description: Clone a project with all its settings, eval datasets, and prompt versions.

delete.description: Clear the project's response cache.

post.description: Ingest raw text into the knowledge base.
Ingest a web page into the knowledge base.

Upload and ingest a file into the knowledge base.

`method` controls the document processing pipeline:
- `auto` (default) — tries Docling → MarkItDown → Classic in order
- `classic` — LlamaIndex file readers (fast, basic text extraction)
- `docling` — deep-learning document understanding (best for complex PDFs)
- `markitdown` — Microsoft MarkItDown (broad format support)

The deprecated `classic` boolean is still accepted for backward compatibility.

get.description: Get one entity with all its mentions and related entities.

patch.description: Rename an entity (update display name only — normalized name is derived).

post.description: Merge this entity (source) INTO the target entity. Source is deleted.

get.description: List potential duplicate entity pairs based on name similarity.
Return nodes and edges for knowledge graph visualization.

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Max number of top entities to include
schema.title: Limit

parameters.description: Max number of top entities to include

post.description:
Natural language query against the knowledge graph.

Extracts entities from the question, finds sources mentioning those entities,
fetches matching chunks from the vector store, then asks the project's LLM
to answer using only those chunks as context.
Re-extract entities for ALL sources in this project. Runs in background.

User must be a member or admin of the team, or a platform admin.

Only team admins and platform admins can update team details.

Only platform admins can delete teams.
